title: Moving folders when all items are completed
excerpt: I feel like this should be simple and maybe im missing something. We are using this for onboarding. I would like once all items are completed for the board to move from its current folder to a folder call completed. Howe…

posts.author: TJPadgett (Tyler Joe Padgett)
posts.cookedHtml: I feel like this should be simple and maybe im missing something. We are using this for onboarding. I would like once all items are completed for the board to move from its current folder to a folder call completed. However I can not find a built in automation nor can I find a custom way to say When ALL items are complete move to X. Am I just missing it?

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @TJPadgett - you’re not missing anything. There currently is no auto board archiving available. You can archive via automations at the row level but not at the board level.

Mark

posts.author: optoprojects (OPTO Projects)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have seen multiple requests for this type of feature. Is this something that will be implemented in the future?

It is one feature I really wish was available for our workflow.
